title: IMMZD18SPolioIPVOnly ValueSet for Decision Table Display Values
description: Display values for IMMZD18SPolioIPVOnly ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet codes. Generated from FHIR expansions. Keys are code fragments (the part after '#' in the canonical IRI). The full IRI can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code.

fhir:displays.description: Multilingual display values for ValueSet codes keyed by code fragment

^.+$.description: Display values for a specific code fragment by language

^[a-z]{2}(-[A-Z]{2})?$.description: Display value in the specified language (ISO 639-1 code)

First IPV dose from the primary series w.en: First IPV dose from the primary series was administered

Second IPV dose from the primary series.en: Second IPV dose from the primary series was administered

Third IPV dose from the primary series w.en: Third IPV dose from the primary series was administered. The primary series has been completed
Third IPV dose from the primary series was administered and the client's age was 6 weeks when the primary series was started

Booster IPV dose was administered. Polio.en: Booster IPV dose was administered. Polio immunization schedule has been completed
